title: eucomis regia
intro: Eucomis regia, also known as the King's Spear or Pineapple Flower, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asparagaceae family, native to southern Africa. The medicinal properties of Eucomis regia lie in its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include relieving coughs, colds, and congestion, as well as reducing fever and soothing sore throats. Eucomis regia can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties, which can also be used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
